headline: Animation History
description: Animation creates the illusion of motion through sequential images. History: flip books → traditional hand-drawn (Disney, 1920s+) → stop-motion (clay, puppets) → CGI (Pixar's Toy Story, 1995, first fully CGI feature) → modern hybrid. Disney's 12 principles of animation (Thomas & Johnston, 1981) remain foundational.

citation.name: The Illusion of Life: Disney Animation (Thomas & Johnston)
The Animator's Survival Kit (2025 Expanded Edition)
citation.author: Williams R.
